title: tetragonia distorta
intro: Tetragonia distorta, also known as Beach Spinach or New Zealand Spinach, is a type of succulent plant that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Tetragonia distorta include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Tetragonia distorta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Tetragonia distorta include tea, infusions, and salads, where the leaves can be eaten raw or cooked, and it can also be used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds.
